name: Rahim Uddin
bio: Grew up in Dhaka and went to the same school for 10 years. We used to play football every afternoon in the neighborhood field.

name: Ayesha Khan
bio: Met during university group projects. We often studied together before exams and still share notes and career advice.

bio: Met in college hostel. We bonded over late-night gaming sessions and tech discussions about programming and startups.

bio: Former office colleague from a software company. We worked together on multiple frontend projects and still occasionally collaborate.

bio: My cousin who lives nearby. We often meet during family gatherings and share personal updates regularly.

bio: Best friend from school days. We used to sit on the same bench and still try to meet whenever possible.

bio: Met through a developer community. We discuss web development, Next.js, and share coding resources regularly.

bio: University project partner. We worked together on multiple assignments and still keep in touch for career advice.
